planning_gate.spec_delta: M19 moves from a 7cm recoverable intermediate gate to the exp29 8cm visible gate with knee/hip checks.

perspectives.product: targets the actual visible squat criteria instead of another intermediate gate
perspectives.architecture: reuses exp71 event recapture and increases target drop/blend while measuring joint flexion gaps
perspectives.qa: native raw JSON per candidate plus 8cm/knee/hip/support gates
perspectives.skeptic: more target authority may immediately re-enter the support/ZMP collapse branch

dod: run visible-gate candidates around exp72's pass
report best 8cm gate result and remaining drop/knee/hip gaps

sources.note: Humanoid squat motion is framed as trajectory optimization plus WBC tracking.
Squat-like WBC controls CoM/ZMP, feet pose, and joint limits.
ZMP inside the support polygon is a dynamic balance condition for humanoids.
